violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 10 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The floors especially in the back area have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The wall in the back area near the 3 bay sink & mop sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
Ceiling tile in the 3 bay sink area is in poor repair, stained with previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024

The wall by the mop sink are constructed of painted drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the small counter refrigeration unit in coffee area. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

Muffins packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Muffins were placed behind the checkout counter away from self service coffee area counter. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

Food observed stored on the floor in the market. Food observed stored on shelves less than 6 inches from floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

Wood and/or pressed fiberboard is used in the construction of shelves in areas of the market. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the 3 bay sink, and the makeshift shelf above the 3 bay sink have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the Nestle ice cream freezer, and the ice freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024
The floor in the walk in cooler is in poor repair, with cracked tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The floors especially in the walk in cooler and the back room have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust, mold, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
A drainboard constructed of wood attached to the 3 bay sink is in poor repair and must be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
Water observed dripping into a container in the walk in cooler. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in areas of the establishment and outside along the building. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024

The ceiling in the 3 bay sink area is in poor repair, with ceiling tiles stained from previous water damage, and section of missing tile. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the back area, above the 3 bay sink. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
